summary: American celebrity portrait photographer known for her iconic Rolling Stone and Vanity Fair covers. Famous for her portraits of John Lennon and Yoko Ono (taken hours before Lennon's murder), nude Demi Moore pregnant on the Vanity Fair cover, and her controversial topless photo of Miley Cyrus. Long-term partner of Susan Sontag. Also documented the Bosnian War.

works.name: John Lennon and Yoko Ono (1980)
works.description: Leibovitz's most famous photograph: a nude John Lennon curled in a near-fetal position around his fully-dressed wife Yoko Ono, taken hours before Lennon was killed by Mark David Chapman on December 8, 1980. Published on the cover of Rolling Stone. Sam Taylor-Wood and Henry Bond recreated this image in the work '26 October 1993.' Wikipedia

clues.clue: Shows a nude John Lennon curled in a fetal position around his fully clothed wife Yoko Ono, taken hours before Lennon's murder
examples: A nude man curls in a near-fetal position around his fully-dressed wife in a 1981 photo by this photographer.
This photographer who captured Yoko Ono and John Lennon embracing on the day of Lennon's assassination.

clues.clue: Taken the day Lennon was killed by Mark David Chapman
examples: One of this artist's most famous photographs was taken just hours before one of its subjects was killed by Mark David Chapman.
This photographer depicted John Lennon embracing his wife Yoko Ono on the day he was killed.

clues.clue: Sam Taylor-Wood and Henry Bond recreated this image in the work '26 October 1993'
examples: Taylor Wood collaborated with Henry Bond to recreate this female photographer's iconic portrait of John Lennon and Yoko Ono on the day that he died in the work 26 October 1993.

works.name: Demi Moore Vanity Fair Covers (1991–1992)
works.description: Two iconic Vanity Fair covers of Demi Moore: one (1991) showing Moore nude and seven-months pregnant (her hand covering her breasts, her other hand on her belly), and one (1992) showing Moore in a body-painted 'Birthday Suit.' These covers ignited celebrity magazine cover controversies. Wikipedia

clues.clue: 1991 Vanity Fair cover showing Demi Moore nude and seven-months pregnant
examples: This photographer ignited a craze with a 1991 Vanity Fair cover depicting a seven-months-pregnant, nude Demi Moore.
This photographer's portraits include a nude, pregnant Demi Moore for Vanity Fair.

clues.clue: 1992 Vanity Fair cover showing Demi Moore in a body-painted 'Birthday Suit'
examples: This photographer shot a 1992 image of Demi Moore in a body-painted 'Birthday Suit,' one year after her landmark cover photo of Moore pregnant.

works.name: Caitlyn Jenner Vanity Fair Cover (2015)
works.description: 2015 Vanity Fair cover depicting Caitlyn Jenner in a white dress with the caption 'Call Me Caitlyn,' marking Jenner's public debut as a trans woman. Wikipedia

clues.clue: Vanity Fair cover depicting Caitlyn Jenner in a white dress with caption 'Call Me Caitlyn'
examples: A Vanity Fair cover by this woman depicts its subject in a white dress with the caption 'Call Me Caitlyn.'
In 2015, she also photographed Vanity Fair's cover depicting Caitlyn Jenner.

works.name: Bosnian War Photography
works.description: Leibovitz photographed the Bosnian War while accompanied by her partner Susan Sontag. Her image 'Bloody Bicycle' (also called 'Fallen Bicycle of Teenage Boy Just Killed by a Sniper') shows an overturned bicycle with a crescent trail of blood on a Sarajevo street. Wikipedia

clues.clue: Photographed a fallen bicycle with a trail of blood in Sarajevo during the Bosnian War
examples: A blood smear lies next to a fallen bicycle in a photo this photographer took while in Sarajevo with their partner Susan Sontag.
A crescent streak of blood extends from an overturned bicycle in an image this artist took during the Bosnian War.

clues.clue: Documented the Bosnian War while accompanied by her partner Susan Sontag
examples: A blood smear lies next to a fallen bicycle in a photo this photographer took while in Sarajevo with their partner Susan Sontag.

works.name: Other Notable Portraits
works.description: Various other famous Leibovitz portraits: Whoopi Goldberg lying in a bathtub full of milk; controversial topless photo of 15-year-old Miley Cyrus (2008) for Vanity Fair; LeBron James with Gisele Bundchen on a 2008 Vogue cover (controversially evoked King Kong/WWI 'Destroy This Mad Brute' poster); 2016 Pirelli Calendar with subjects like Serena Williams and Amy Schumer; nude Keith Haring standing atop a paint-covered coffee table; Born in the U.S.A. album cover for Bruce Springsteen. Wikipedia

works.name: General / Biographical
works.description: American portrait photographer (1949–). Long-term partner of writer Susan Sontag (also photographed Sontag in a bear suit). Chief photographer for Rolling Stone; later chief photographer for Vanity Fair. Climbed Mount Fuji after purchasing her first camera (a Minolta SR-T 101), described in her memoir At Work. Photographed dancer David Parsons by mounting an eagle gargoyle of the Chrysler Building, emulating Margaret Bourke-White. Photographed Julia Margaret Cameron's cottage in the book Pilgrimage. Chose Serena Williams and Amy Schumer for the 2016 Pirelli Calendar, focusing on subjects other than models and sexuality. Photographed Maurice Sendak with his dog in a celebrated environmental portrait. Wikipedia

clues.clue: Long-term partner was writer Susan Sontag; also photographed Sontag in a bear suit
examples: This artist shot a half nude David Cassidy for the cover of Rolling Stone and once photographed her lover Susan Sontag in a bear suit.
Two nude Vanity Fair covers depicting a nude Demi Moore and several portraits of their lover, Susan Sontag.

examples: This photographer recalls how the first thing they did after purchasing a Minolta SR-T 101 was climb Mount Fuji in the memoir 'At Work.'

clues.clue: Emulated Margaret Bourke-White by mounting the Chrysler Building's eagle gargoyle to photograph dancer David Parsons
examples: Emulating Margaret Bourke-White, this artist mounted one of the eagle gargoyles of the Chrysler Building to capture a tricky shot of dancer David Parsons.
In 1991, Leibovitz imitated this other photographer [Bourke-White] by taking pictures from the Chrysler Building's gargoyles.

examples: This photographer documented Cameron's cottage in the book Pilgrimage.

comprehensive_summary:
Annie Leibovitz (born 1949) is an American celebrity and portrait photographer who became famous as chief photographer for Rolling Stone and later as the leading portrait photographer for Vanity Fair. Her most iconic photograph is the 1980 image of a nude John Lennon curled in a fetal position around his fully clothed wife Yoko Ono, taken hours before Lennon was shot by Mark David Chapman. This image was published on the cover of Rolling Stone and has been widely recreated and referenced (notably by Sam Taylor-Wood and Henry Bond in '26 October 1993').

For Vanity Fair, Leibovitz created a series of celebrated and controversial covers: the 1991 cover of a nude, seven-months-pregnant Demi Moore; the 1992 'Birthday Suit' cover showing Moore in body paint; a 2008 cover of LeBron James and Gisele Bundchen that controversially evoked the WWI recruitment poster 'Destroy This Mad Brute'; and the 2015 cover depicting Caitlyn Jenner in a white dress with the caption 'Call Me Caitlyn.' She also took a controversial topless photo of 15-year-old Miley Cyrus in 2008, and photographed Whoopi Goldberg submerged in a tub of milk.

Leibotvitz documented the Bosnian War while traveling to Sarajevo with her long-term partner, writer Susan Sontag. There she photographed 'Bloody Bicycle' (also called 'Fallen Bicycle of Teenage Boy Just Killed by a Sniper'), showing an overturned bicycle with a blood trail on the street. Other notable work includes a nude portrait of Keith Haring standing atop a paint-covered coffee table that blended into his similarly patterned living room, and the Born in the U.S.A. album cover for Bruce Springsteen showing a man in jeans facing an American flag.

Biographically, Leibovitz climbed Mount Fuji after purchasing her first camera — a Minolta SR-T 101 — as recounted in her memoir At Work. She emulated Margaret Bourke-White by mounting the eagle gargoyle of the Chrysler Building to photograph dancer David Parsons. She photographed the cottage of 19th-century photographer Julia Margaret Cameron in her book Pilgrimage. She also photographed Susan Sontag in a bear suit. For the 2016 Pirelli Calendar, she chose subjects like Serena Williams and Amy Schumer instead of traditional models.

Margaret Bourke-White — repeatedly referenced as the photographer Leibovitz emulated; appears in same bonus sets
Yoko Ono — appears in many of the same questions due to the Lennon photo
